Weighted moving average of forecasting is

Correct answer: B

Q3 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A set of jobs A, B, C, D, E, F, G, H arrive at time t = 0 for processing on machine-I and machine-II. Each jobs needs to be processed in sequence, first on machine-I and then on machine-II. The processing times (in minutes) of the jobs are given below:

The optimum sequence to minimize the total make span of production is

Correct answer: B
Solution

(b)
Using Johnson’s algorithm,
If minimum time is for machine-II, it is scheduled at last and if minimum time is for machine-I, it
is scheduled first.
The optimum sequence obtained is
F-D-G-H-B-A-C-E

Correct answer: 6.25 (6.24 - 6.26)
